title: Explicit serde bound on SetResponse<T> is required, not redundant
description: SetResponse carries #[serde(bound(deserialize = "T: serde::de::DeserializeOwned"))]. With a default type parameter, serde's derive macro cannot infer the Deserialize bound correctly without this annotation: it would either fail to compile or generate an overly restrictive bound. A contributor might delete it as 'unnecessary'. Without it the generated impl requires T: Deserialize<'de> (lifetime-bound) rather than DeserializeOwned, which breaks uses like GetResponse<serde_json::Value> in an owned context. The annotation is load-bearing.
